rulings.Case Title: JYOTSNA SABRINA BIRES, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A VS. MERVYN FRANCIS BURKE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 25, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT THOMAS PIER DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. All motions continued to September 9, 2009 on the Court's own motion. All parties to provide briefs of no more than five pages in length addressing whether the derivative causes of action should be severed from the personal or individual causes of action in view of Shenberg vs. DeGarmo (1943) 61 Cal.App. 2nd 326, 331. Briefs due no later than September 2nd with no opposition or reply briefs. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: FRANK W. RUPP et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 25, 2009, line 11, RESPONDENT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Res judicata Bars this action. The $75,000.00 claim was litigated in Nevada and that case has become final. Plaintiff Gould has no standing and is not a real party in interest. Litigation privilege applies to post judgment enforcement activities. (Civil Code section 47.) No reasonable probability that defects could be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)
